title: xPickaxes
body:
# вӣҸпёҸ xPickaxes

**xPickaxes** is a professional Spigot/Paper plugin that adds fully customizable pickaxes with area mining, an intuitive GUI, permission-based access, and special effects вҖ” all configurable without touching a single line of Java.

> Compatible with **Minecraft 1.19 вҖ“ 1.21+** (Paper & Spigot)

---

## вңЁ Features

- **Area Mining** вҖ” Mine 3Г—3, 5Г—5, 7Г—7, or 9Г—9 areas with a single block break
- **In-game GUI** вҖ” Right-click any custom pickaxe to open a clean configuration menu
- **Special Effects**
  - рҹ”Ҙ **Auto-Smelting** вҖ” Ores are smelted directly into ingots
  - вңЁ **Fortune Boost** вҖ” Increased drops on all mined blocks
  - вӣҸ **Vein Miner** вҖ” Mines entire connected ore veins at once (up to 64 blocks)
  - рҹ”Қ **Ore Highlight** вҖ” Visual glow effect on nearby ores *(framework ready)*
- **Per-player Settings** вҖ” Each player can toggle area mining and effects individually
- **Permission System** вҖ” Fine-grained control over which players access which pickaxes and effects
- **Custom Area Sizes** вҖ” Players can choose their preferred area size from the GUI
- **Blacklist Support** вҖ” Prevent area mining on specific blocks (bedrock, command blocks, etc.)
- **WorldGuard Compatible** вҖ” Respects protected regions
- **Sound & Particle Effects** вҖ” Satisfying feedback on area mines (toggleable)
- **Fully Config-Driven** вҖ” Add or edit pickaxe types entirely from `config.yml`

---

## рҹ“Ұ Pickaxe Tiers

| Tier | Area | Material | Effects | Permission |
|------|------|----------|---------|------------|
| **Novice** | 3Г—3 | Iron Pickaxe | вҖ” | `xpickaxes.pickaxe.novice` |
| **Adept** | 5Г—5 | Golden Pickaxe | Fortune Boost | `xpickaxes.pickaxe.adept` |
| **Master** | 7Г—7 | Diamond Pickaxe | Fortune + Auto-Smelting | `xpickaxes.pickaxe.master` |
| **Titan** | 9Г—9 | Netherite Pickaxe | Fortune + Auto-Smelting + Vein Miner | `xpickaxes.pickaxe.titan` |

All tiers are fully editable or removable in `config.yml`. You can also add your own!

---

## рҹҺ® Commands

| Command | Description | Permission |
|---------|-------------|------------|
| `/xpickaxe give <type> [player]` | Give a custom pickaxe | `xpickaxes.give` |
| `/xpickaxe list` | List all available pickaxe types | `xpickaxes.use` |
| `/xpickaxe menu` | Open the GUI for your held pickaxe | `xpickaxes.use` |
| `/xpickaxe reload` | Reload the plugin config | `xpickaxes.reload` |
| `/xpickaxe help` | Show help | вҖ” |

**Aliases:** `/xpick`, `/xp`

---

## рҹ”‘ Permissions

| Permission | Default | Description |
|------------|---------|-------------|
| `xpickaxes.use` | Everyone | Use custom pickaxes |
| `xpickaxes.give` | OP | Give custom pickaxes |
| `xpickaxes.reload` | OP | Reload the plugin |
| `xpickaxes.admin` | OP | Full admin access (includes give + reload) |
| `xpickaxes.pickaxe.novice` | Everyone | Access to Novice pickaxe |
| `xpickaxes.pickaxe.adept` | OP | Access to Adept pickaxe |
| `xpickaxes.pickaxe.master` | OP | Access to Master pickaxe |
| `xpickaxes.pickaxe.titan` | OP | Access to Titan pickaxe |
| `xpickaxes.effect.autosmelting` | OP | Use Auto-Smelting effect |
| `xpickaxes.effect.veinminer` | OP | Use Vein Miner effect |
| `xpickaxes.effect.fortune` | OP | Use Fortune Boost effect |
| `xpickaxes.effect.xray` | OP | Use Ore Highlight effect |

---

## рҹ–ҘпёҸ GUI Overview

**Right-click** any xPickaxes custom pickaxe (or run `/xpickaxe menu`) to open the configuration panel:

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ   [Pickaxe]      [Pickaxe Configuration]            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  [Toggle Area]   [Compass]  [3x3][5x5][7x7][9x9][вң—]в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  [вҳ…]  [Effect1] [Effect2] [Effect3] [Effect4]       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ               [в„№ Info]                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                          [вң– Close]                  в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

- **Toggle Area Mining** вҖ” Enable/disable area mining for this session
- **Area Size** вҖ” Select 3Г—3, 5Г—5, 7Г—7, or 9Г—9 (or reset to pickaxe default)
- **Effects** вҖ” Toggle each special effect independently (respects permissions)

---

## вҡҷпёҸ Configuration

All pickaxe types, effects, messages, and behavior is defined in `config.yml`. Here's an example of adding a custom pickaxe:

```yaml
pickaxes:
  my_custom_pick:
    enabled: true
    display-name: "&5вңҰ Void Pickaxe"
    lore:
      - "&7Area Mining: &e11x11"
      - ""
      - "&8в–ё Right-click to configure"
    material: NETHERITE_PICKAXE
    area-size: 11
    durability-multiplier: 4.0
    enchantments:
      EFFICIENCY: 5
      UNBREAKING: 3
      FORTUNE: 3
    effects:
      - FORTUNE
      - AUTOSMELTING
      - VEINMINER
    permission: myplugin.voidpickaxe
    give-command-enabled: true
    custom-model-data: 0
```

### Auto-Smelt Mappings

Add custom smelting recipes in `config.yml`:

```yaml
smelt-map:
  IRON_ORE: IRON_INGOT
  GOLD_ORE: GOLD_INGOT
  SAND: GLASS
  # Add your own!
```

---

## рҹ”§ Installation

1. Download `xPickaxes-1.0.0.jar`
2. Drop it into your `plugins/` folder
3. Restart or reload your server
4. Edit `plugins/xPickaxes/config.yml` to customize
5. Run `/xpickaxe reload` to apply changes live

**Requirements:**
- Java 17+
- Paper or Spigot 1.19+
